category_sources: Official FASTBuild docs describe it as an open-source build system with scalable compilation, caching, and network distribution.
source_facts.description says it is a high performance build system for Windows, OSX and Linux.
display_name_sources: Official documentation and website use the stylized name FASTBuild.
source_facts.homepage points to the official FASTBuild site.
docs_sources: Official FASTBuild documentation index on fastbuild.org.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value; per instructions repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: Official FASTBuild feature/docs pages describe distributed compilation, caching, and C/C++ compilation workflows.
